arts.ttl: Barcelona handed UEFA ban for racism after fans display Nazi banner in Champions League
arts.sum: Barcelona have been punished for racism by UEFA after their supporters held up a banner which read "Flick heil" during a Champions League game away against Monaco
Barcelona clear up Lamine Yamal injury fears - Football España "He's the best winger in the world" - Robert Lewandowski heaps praise on Lamine Yamal - Football España
The Madrid derby takes centre stage in LaLiga this weekend and Joe Champion has score predictions for that contest and all the other tussles in the Spanish top flight.

arts.ttl: UEFA hands Barça 1-game fans ban over racism
arts.sum: Barcelona have been banned from selling tickets to their fans for their next Champions League away game after their supporters were found guilty of racist behaviour during their match against AS Monaco, governing body UEFA said on Friday.

arts.ttl: Barcelona rule out move for Wojciech Szczesny alternatives as negotiations stall
arts.sum: Barcelona decided the best course of action was to sign one of the current free agent goalkeepers to replace Marc-Andre ter Stegen, following his long-term injury. However if they do not get a deal for Wojciech Szczesny over the line, the latest is that the Blaugrana may wait until January to bring in an alternative. […] The post Barcelona rule out move for Wojciech Szczesny alternatives as negotiations stall appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick close to making Barcelona history after latest win
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick enjoyed yet another La Liga win on Wednesday night, watching his team secure what was ultimately a comfortable 1-0 scoreline against Getafe. Sadly for Martino, despite the perfect start in La Liga, he didn't enjoy any trophy success beyond the Supercopa de Espana and stepped down after only one season.

arts.ttl: Man Utd's failed €100m bid for Barcelona star revealed
arts.sum: Manchester United are reported to have made a monstrous offer to sign Ansu Fati from Barcelona when the young forward was just 17 years of age. Fati was aged 16 years and 298 days when he made his Barcelona debut in August 2019, at that time the club's youngest player since 1941.

arts.ttl: Barca transfer news: La Masia graduate 'set' to commit long-term future to club
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly set to hand teenage midfielder Marc Bernal a new, long-term contract at the club, which will tie him down until 2029.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi and Sergio Aguero join padel! Esports team backed by Argentine legends follow Andy Murray, Robert Lewandowski and Rafael Nadal into Hexagon Cup
arts.sum: After the success of its first edition, the Hexagon Cup - a revolutionary padel tournament will return with a star-studded addition next year in Madrid.
